meta.title: Kortz Center Heist Calculator
notes: The primary target receives the weekly multiplier only on the first sale of the weekly cycle.
Hard mode increases the primary-target payout by approximately 10%.
Secondary-target values vary between runs. The exact value shown by Raf takes priority over every guide estimate.

The 64 secondary-target names are verified from fm_content_kortz_scoping.ysc and the English global.gxt2. Default values, bag fill, cutter requirements, and locations remain provisional until live tunables and in-game observations are verified.
